creator: pjchilds@imforei.apana.org.au
text:
System crashed at least 8->10 times today with the above panic message.
 Rebuilt the kernel with NETATALK removed and DDB added - no change.

 System "seems" not to exhibit problem when i don't turn on swap at
 boot up.

 System previously ran solid under 2.1.0, 2.1-stable, and 2.1.5-stable
 (which hopefully rules out hardware problems :)

Fix: 

Unknown.  I'm not sure what this panic implies so I was hoping someone
 could give me a few pointers like???
How-To-Repeat: 
 Operate under moderate load (ie just running cvsup, one user logged in,
 sendmail/inn running (minimal traffic))
